title: alangium villosum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Alangium villosum subsp. tomentosum, also known as the velvet alangium, is a plant species within the Alangium genus, native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Alangium villosum subsp. tomentosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, are used to harness the plant's medicinal properties, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
